name: wrap-command
goal: Add /wrap command to plan-mode extension for post-execution close-out checklist that detects documentation gaps and reports status with actionable instructions

userStories.title: Add /wrap command skeleton
userStories.description: Add the command handler and registration following existing patterns (handleReview, handlePreMortem). Command requires active plan and outputs via pi.sendUserMessage().
acceptanceCriteria: /wrap responds with a message when invoked
Command requires active plan (error if !state.currentSlug)
Follows handleReview pattern (uses pi.sendUserMessage())
No new state fields added to PlanModeState
Extension tests pass: npx tsx --test '.pi/extensions/plan-mode/*.test.ts'

userStories.title: Implement detection logic
userStories.description: Add detection functions for checklist items: memory entry exists (file glob), MEMORY.md index contains slug (string search), plan status check, changed directories (git diff with fallback), capability catalog freshness.
acceptanceCriteria: checkMemoryEntry(slug) returns boolean via file glob
checkMemoryIndex(slug) returns boolean via string search
checkPlanStatus(slug) returns status string from frontmatter
getChangedDirectories() returns string[] from git diff or null on failure
checkCapabilityCatalog() returns lastUpdated date from JSON
Git failure produces graceful fallback message, not crash

userStories.title: Implement tiered output
userStories.description: Build the checklist output with status indicators (✅/❌/⚠️). Each missing item has actionable instruction. Each suggested-review item is marked ⚠️. Output adapts based on tier (code vs docs-only). Send via pi.sendUserMessage().
acceptanceCriteria: Output shows ✅/❌/⚠️ per checklist item
Each ❌ item has actionable instruction (e.g., 'Create memory entry at...')
Each ⚠️ item says 'suggested review'
Output adapts based on tier (detects if PRD vs direct execution)
Sent via pi.sendUserMessage() for agent to process

userStories.title: Add tests and documentation
userStories.description: Add tests for handleWrap covering: no plan open, plan with all items done, plan with gaps, git failure fallback. Update LEARNINGS.md if gotchas discovered. Update capability catalog to include /wrap entrypoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover: no plan open returns error message
Tests cover: plan open with memory entry returns ✅
Tests cover: plan open without memory entry returns ❌ with instruction
Tests cover: git failure returns graceful fallback
Extension tests pass: npx tsx --test '.pi/extensions/plan-mode/*.test.ts'
LEARNINGS.md updated if gotchas discovered during implementation
dev/catalog/capabilities.json includes /wrap in pi-plan-mode-extension entrypoints
